productDisplayName: John Players Men Gingham Blue Shirt
description: Style Note john players will have you spoilt for choice when it comes to casual options with this comfortable and stylish checked shirt. Paired with comfortable chinos or jeans, they add quite the splash of colour and trend to your look. This shirt comes from their Indigo Trail collection - their exclusive summer range. Product Details Shirt with white and blue checks and yellow hues has short sleeves, a spread collar, full buttoned placket, and patch pockets on the left and right chest Material and Care 100% Cotton Machine wash cold with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low or dry in shade inside out Use warm iron Size and Fit John Players' trim fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size 40
